name: Dead weight in the apocalypse
description:
"Could I trully be more than just a liability in this world?"

For some the world ended, for some it simply transformed.

The infection took the world by storm. It turned humans unfortunate enough to be afflicted by it into bloodthristy predatory anthropomorphic animals, or in shorter term - ferals.

The remaining humans were forced into hiding as they no longer were the superior species. Some stuck close, some prefered solitude, but one thing was clear, one wrong move meant that they'd most likely end up dead.

But somewhere out there there also happens to be a group of ferals who hadn't turned into predators but prey.

Dustin used to be a regular guy trying to make sense of life's chaos and unpredicatbility. He certainly wasn't in the most stable point of his life but he tackled each day with carefree optimism.

Until the world went feral

Dustin was one of the people who were transformed, but unlike other's he turned into a prey animal - a white rabbit. Unlike the other ferals that were overcome with bloodlust, he found his mind unaffected by the virus.

But his transformation didn't come without a cost. Dustin quickly realised when trying to actually scavenge for supplies that wherever he goes, he quickly becomes the primary target of the ferals roaming the city.

Other humans don't want anything to do with him as his presence draws out the worst in other ferals, not to mention them being able to smell him from longer distances.

And ferals themselves are even more of a danger than with any other person. Their hunting in
